Did you know these products are made in China? The Paris 2024 Organising Committee reveals that 80 percent of the mascots are produced by Chinese manufacturers. Plus, Chinese technology is making a significant impact throughout the Games. Experience how China-made tech is set to enhance the Olympics with stunning visuals and cutting-edge innovation!

title: 'Made in China' shines at the Paris Olympics - CGTN
author: T-House,CGTN
description: Did you know these products are made in China? The Paris 2024 Organising Committee reveals that 80 percent of the mascots are produced by Chinese manufacturers.
